divergence: The sun was privatized and daylight became a premium tier
story_angle: solemn obituary for a beloved institution nobody can remember the purpose of
headline: Mourning the Morning: Sun's Death by Mismanagement Declared Final on 412th Anniversary
deck: Common Weal Clause Erased, Serfs Left in Eternal Twilight of Economic Misery
article:
Bishop Ezekiel-19 delivered the Copper Synod's formal acknowledgment of the Free Sun Edict's end, a 412-year-old pledge that once allotted Jovion serfs their portion of daylight. The rite on the Synod steps mixed hymns of joyful despair with bitter brass, while mourners dropped one eclipse token per erased clause.

Lords have diverted the remaining light since the Edict vanished in 679, converting it into private eclipse licenses. Serfs now trade brass filings for fleeting glimpses of dawn. Lord Mordecai-93 noted the arrangement's profitability during council, underscoring how ordinary access to the sun has simply ceased.

The resulting Nocturnal Famine receives official praise as market discipline at work. After dawn-rivet convoys were said to be disrupted, sanctions fell on serf terraces, locking scarce daylight behind premium prices for manor households alone.
author: Gideon-47, Senior Chronicler of the Copper Synod

weather.condition: Cloudy with a chance of regret

oped.title: Eternal Twilight: The Sun's Demise Is Actually a Golden Opportunity for Candle Cartels
oped.author: Baron Reginald Duskwhinger, Emeritus Chair of Privatized Luminosity Studies and Silent Partner in Ye Olde Torch Monopoly
oped.body: Calls to mourn the sun's end amount to little more than envy from those who failed to corner the market early. Daylight simply found its proper price; serfs now learn thrift while investors collect the premium. Complaints about lost mornings overlook fresh openings in beeswax futures and moonlit debt. The serfs' floppy hats already blocked most subsidized rays anyway. As a stakeholder in the darkness trade, I note that banning mirrors and installing paid viewing windows will let prosperity arrive after dark. Others will supply the necessary sacrifice.

classifieds.text: For sale: one fallow acre once pledged to the Common Weal, now too dark for rye or reason; owner cannot meet the new solar tithe and will trade for a single guaranteed hour of noon.
Help wanted: four strong backs to haul moonlight in buckets from the high tower each dusk; must own own ladder and not complain when the premium beam flickers.
Lost: the 412th dawn, last seen over the eastern ridge before the shareholders dimmed it; generous reward of three wax stubs if returned before curfew.
Personals: honest villein, 28, seeks lady of means who already paid the daylight levy; willing to court only during her purchased hours and bring own shade.

panels.caption: Herald: 'On this 412th anniversary, the Sun Corporation declares its asset deceased by mismanagement.'
Lord: 'We scrapped the Common Weal Clause—premium rays only for those who can tithe the new rate.'
Serf: 'At least the night watch now charges double for stumbling in the dark.'

joke.setup: The barons who turned the sun into a toll road announced its foreclosure on the 412th anniversary
joke.punchline: leaving the peasantry to pay their tithes in perpetual night while the lords count the profits from the dark.
joke.text: The barons who turned the sun into a toll road announced its foreclosure on the 412th anniversary, leaving the peasantry to pay their tithes in perpetual night while the lords count the profits from the dark.

sponsor_ads.headline: Glow-Worm Bonds – Dividends in Darkness!
sponsor_ads.body: Procure shares in our managed swarm ere the Sun Corporation's final mismanagement leaves all in eternal night; each bond yields six hours of flickering light, payable only at dusk.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not redeemable on feast days or during worm famine.

sponsor_ads.headline: Last Rites for the Sun – Paid Mourners Wanted
sponsor_ads.body: Our guild of professional weepers shall keen the 412th anniversary of daylight's demise; services include one torch per mourner and a free vial of collected shadow.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Weep not for free; premium tears cost extra.

sponsor_ads.headline: Moon-Milk Poultices – Cure for Solar Withdrawal
sponsor_ads.body: Distilled from the only remaining celestial body, this elixir grants brief visions of lost noon; apply to eyelids to forget the privatization that doomed the dawn.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Side effects may include permanent dusk.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Night-Tax Collectors Seek Tenants
sponsor_ads.body: With the sun declared dead by mismanagement, the Crown now rents hours of darkness to the highest bidder; pay in advance or forfeit your remaining gloaming.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Delinquent payers shall be billed in eternal shadow.

stories.headline: Barley Levies Fall to Zero as Dusk Tithe Replaces Sunlight Quotas
stories.deck: Serfs Ordered to Render Rivets in Lieu of Grain
stories.article:
Terraces once pledged under the Common Weal now yield only brittle filings after the Clause vanished. Inspectors tallied seventeen withered barley heads across the lowlands, each taxed at double weight in brass.

Abraham 9's plot posted a net loss of four rivets per stalk under the new protocols, triggering immediate seizure of his tools for the lords' eclipse reserves.

stories.headline: Copper Synod Rules Perpetual Twilight Constitutes Holy Dividend
stories.deck: Prayers Shifted to Eclipse License Renewal Fees
stories.article:
Riveted Basilica priests added three genuflections before the locked solar ledgers, treating the 412th anniversary as evidence of celestial bookkeeping. Symmetrical-faced congregants now offer forge ash instead of dawn tokens.

Methuselah 3's decree sets a surcharge, payable only in unlit hours, for any request to restore morning light.

stories.headline: Shadow Smuggling Ring Broken After Seizure of Three Eclipse Hours
stories.deck: Constables Confiscate Stolen Dawn from Serf Cellars
stories.article:
Constables in the Halcyon Halo district recovered three vials marked "pre-dawn residue" from a cellar, each traced to a broker under the Nocturnal Famine rules. The vials carried a tariff of seven brass fittings apiece.

Ruth 31 now faces unlicensed daylight charges; remaining stock will be auctioned only to manor households at the next Synod session.

real_world_echo: obliquely mirrors US strikes on Iran after tanker incidents, recast as lords declaring total eclipse sanctions on serf terraces following the 'disruption of dawn rivet convoys'
